Our Sailing Team Presidency 4. International Yacht Races 100th Returned from the Year Cup with Awards

Our Sailing Team, consisting of

Eda Çizmecioğlu

(Industrial Design)

(Psychology),

Şevval Solakoğlu

(International Trade and Finance) and

Ayça Afacan

(International Trade and Finance), participated in the Sailing Team held on October 27-29 with the boat named “Bluemoon Jr.”

Presidency 4. International Yacht Races 100th Year Cup

joined the.

Our team, which competed on the Caddebostan-Adalar course on Friday, October 27, on the Bosphorus on Saturday, October 28, and in the Caddebostan buoy race on Sunday, October 29, came 3rd in the

Gezgin class, 3rd among Gezgin class university teams, and also 2nd among Gezgin class women’s teams.

We congratulate our athletes and wish them continued success.
